evaluators.name: Register Earliest Qualifying Kids Beginner Swim Class Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user registered for a kids beginner-level group swim class (ages 6–8, start ≥ 4:00 PM, price ≤ $120) and whether it is the earliest such class.

evaluators.name: Reserve Cheapest Qualifying Indoor Lap Lane Tomorrow Morning Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user reserved an indoor lap lane slot tomorrow between 6:00–7:00 AM under $15, and whether the reserved slot is the cheapest qualifying option.

evaluators.name: Purchase Optimal Family 1-Month Membership Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user considered qualifying 1-month family plans with pool and fitness access, purchased a qualifying plan, and chose the one with the latest weekday closing time (with lower price as tie-breaker).

evaluators.name: Reserve Cheapest Qualifying Saturday Birthday Party Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a Saturday birthday party reservation for 15 children with private room and pizza under $350, and whether the chosen package is the cheapest qualifying option.

evaluators.name: Add Three Qualifying Next-Week Evening Open Swim Sessions to My Schedule Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added at least three distinct evening open swim sessions for next calendar week, all starting at or after 5:00 PM, including at least one indoor and one outdoor session on different weekdays.

evaluators.name: Purchase Optimal 5-Visit Digital Guest Passes Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user purchased digital guest passes that provide exactly 5 total visits under $60, and whether the purchased option has the lowest possible total price among qualifying products.

evaluators.name: Enroll in Shortest Qualifying Lifeguard Certification Course Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user enrolled in a weekend-only lifeguard certification course that includes CPR/First Aid, costs under $300, ends before June 30, and whether the chosen course has the shortest total duration.

evaluators.name: Register for Two Non-Overlapping Qualifying Aqua Fitness Classes Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user purchased two different evening aqua fitness classes (6:00–8:00 PM, price ≤ $20) such that one is on Monday/Tuesday and the other on Wednesday/Thursday/Friday, with different class types and non-overlapping times.
